standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per positive state episode

approved_boundary_notice.reason: Amsterdam drugitems exposes explicit continuous syringe-pump interval evidence for vasopressor-capable agents. These rows are narrow enough for same-name vasopressor-support active approval when pure inotrope rows, topical/non-IV rows, bolus injections, screening listitems, dose outputs, shock phenotypes, and agent-specific episode detail remain separate.
approved_boundary_notice.accepted_policy_scope: conservative any vasopressor-capable support positive episode boundary

source_filter_lock.required_interval_rule: start, stop, duration, and derived offset duration are non-null and positive

database_mapping.source_grain: one Amsterdam continuous drugitems syringe-pump interval row before vasopressor-support interval union
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained positive vasopressor-support state episode row after merging overlapping approved source intervals within the stay

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: patientid joined from Amsterdam admissions_core by admissionid
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: not separately available in the current Amsterdam opening mapping
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: raw admissionid is the Amsterdam ICU/MC local admission identifier and normalizes to stay_id under ICU/MC semantics

adjacent_status_boundary.boundary_reason: This same-name variable represents any vasopressor-capable support active, not pure inotrope therapy, agent-specific detail, equivalent-dose exposure, shock phenotype, screening status, or free-day outcome.

state_episode_build_translation.positive_state_translation: retain Amsterdam continuous syringe-pump drugitems intervals for approved vasopressor-capable itemids and merge overlapping retained intervals within the same local admission
state_episode_build_translation.episode_start_translation: use merged source start as Amsterdam relative support_starttime in milliseconds while also emitting relative_start_time_value in minutes
state_episode_build_translation.episode_end_translation: use merged source stop as Amsterdam relative support_endtime in milliseconds while also emitting relative_end_time_value in minutes
state_episode_build_translation.continuity_translation: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous approved vasopressor-capable drugitems intervals; any positive gap starts a new support episode
state_episode_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained row means no positive vasopressor-support episode under this drugitems source rule

validation_contract.positive_only_no_row_policy_check: false rows are not emitted; absence of row is not universal proof of no vasopressor support or no shock
validation_contract.source_code_lock_rule: all retained rows must originate from Amsterdam continuous drugitems syringe-pump intervals for itemids 6818, 7179, 7229, 12467, or 19929
notes: This Amsterdam mapping is reviewed-approved for std_vasopressor_support_active.
The approved source scope is continuous syringe-pump drugitems evidence for vasopressor-capable itemids.
Pure inotrope, topical/non-IV, bolus injection, screening, agent-specific, dose, shock, and free-day semantics remain outside this same-name output.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: Formal Amsterdam same-name output is approved only through the governed execution.py path reading this approved mapping spec and producing runtime plus rerun evidence.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading an approved mapping spec and producing runtime plus rerun evidence.
